attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
-999 as RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
,TRX_ID                        
,TRX_VERSION                   
,OA_UNIT_NET_PRICE AS ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,OA_QUANTITY AS ATTRIBUTED_QUANTITY           
,ENT_SKU_INVENTORY_ID AS ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID     
,COVERED_LINE_ID AS COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID        
,AS_PARENT_SKU_ID AS AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID      
,ARCHITECTURE_ID               
,TECHNOLOGY_ID                 
,COALESCE(TXN_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) AS TXN_CR_PARTY_ID               
,ERP_HEADER_ID                 
,ERP_LINE_ID                   
,ERP_SO_NUMBER                 
,ORDER_NUMBER                  
,LINE_REF_NUMBER               
,SALES_MOTION AS BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION                             
,AS_TS_FLAG                    
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID      
,ITEM_CATEGORIZATION AS BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION    
,PARENT_EXTENDED_PRICE         
,COALESCE(PERCENTAGE,0) AS ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE          
,OFFER_TYPE_ID                 
,COALESCE(HQ_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) AS HQ_CR_PARTY_ID
,COALESCE(RENEWAL_REF_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RENEWAL_REF_TYPE
,COALESCE(RENEWAL_REF_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS RENEWAL_REF_VALUE
,COALESCE(REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_CODE
,COALESCE(USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(CASE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(COMMENTS,'UNKNOWN')
,PRODUCT AS TRX_PRODUCT                   
,MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG          
,EXTENDED_NET_PRICE AS LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE           
,PART_NUMBER                   
,INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION         
,START_DATE                    
,END_DATE                      
,QUOTE_LINE_ID                 
,QUOTE_ID AS QUOTE_NUMBER                  
,BOOKING_TYPE                  
,CONTROL_ID                    
,CCRC_ORDER_HEADER_ID          
,DEAL_ID                       
,END_USER_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,ENT_SKU                       
,ERP_LINE_NET_PRICE                     
,LINE_COUNT                    
,MAPPED_ERP_LINE_MAP           
,OA_SERVICE_LINE               
,PBS_LINE                      
,Q2O_LINE_ID                   
,QUANTITY                      
,QUOTE_TYPE                    
,SERVICE_LEVEL                 
,SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,SMS_LINE                      
,TRANSACTION_SOURCE            
,QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,UNIT_NET_PRICE                
,ORDER_ORIGIN                   
,PID_MATCHING_VALUE            
,ORDER_BOOK_DATE               
,RECORD_OFFSET                 
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,PARTITION_NUMBER              
,TOPIC_NAME   
,COALESCE(OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID, -9999) AS OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID          
,OA_LINKED_ATTRIB_ID           
,OA_ATTRIBUTED_ITEM            
,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          
,OA_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION        
,OA_PID_MATCHING_VALUE         
,OA_SALES_MOTION       
,ATTIBUTION_CD
,CASE WHEN ITEM_CATEGORIZATION IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') OR ORDER_ORIGIN = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN TRX_ID ELSE ERP_LINE_ID END AS DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
,CASE WHEN ITEM_CATEGORIZATION IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') OR ORDER_ORIGIN = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN TRX_VERSION ELSE CONTROL_ID END AS DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID
,ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,COALESCE(RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE
,'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM 
(
SELECT ST_SI.* 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING ST_SI
WHERE ST_SI.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate'  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  -  INTERVAL '1' MINUTE
AND  COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN )
 QUALIFY RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN ITEM_CATEGORIZATION IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') OR ORDER_ORIGIN = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN TRX_ID ELSE ERP_LINE_ID END ORDER BY  CASE WHEN ITEM_CATEGORIZATION IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') OR ORDER_ORIGIN = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN TRX_VERSION ELSE CONTROL_ID  END DESC )=1
) ST1

UNION ALL

SELECT
-999 as RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
,TRX_ID                        
,TRX_VERSION                   
,OA_UNIT_NET_PRICE AS ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,OA_QUANTITY AS ATTRIBUTED_QUANTITY           
,ENT_SKU_INVENTORY_ID AS ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID     
,COVERED_LINE_ID AS COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID        
,AS_PARENT_SKU_ID AS AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID      
,ARCHITECTURE_ID               
,TECHNOLOGY_ID                 
,COALESCE(TXN_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) AS TXN_CR_PARTY_ID               
,ERP_HEADER_ID                 
,ERP_LINE_ID                   
,ERP_SO_NUMBER                 
,ORDER_NUMBER                  
,LINE_REF_NUMBER               
,SALES_MOTION AS BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION                             
,AS_TS_FLAG                    
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID      
,ITEM_CATEGORIZATION AS BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION    
,PARENT_EXTENDED_PRICE         
,COALESCE(PERCENTAGE,0) AS ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE          
,OFFER_TYPE_ID                 
,COALESCE(HQ_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) AS HQ_CR_PARTY_ID
,COALESCE(RENEWAL_REF_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS RENEWAL_REF_TYPE
,COALESCE(RENEWAL_REF_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS RENEWAL_REF_VALUE
,COALESCE(REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_CODE
,COALESCE(USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(CASE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(COMMENTS,'UNKNOWN')
,PRODUCT AS TRX_PRODUCT                   
,MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG          
,EXTENDED_NET_PRICE AS LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE           
,PART_NUMBER                   
,INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION         
,START_DATE                    
,END_DATE                      
,QUOTE_LINE_ID                 
,QUOTE_ID AS QUOTE_NUMBER                  
,BOOKING_TYPE                  
,CONTROL_ID                    
,CCRC_ORDER_HEADER_ID          
,DEAL_ID                       
,END_USER_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,ENT_SKU                       
,ERP_LINE_NET_PRICE                     
,LINE_COUNT                    
,MAPPED_ERP_LINE_MAP           
,OA_SERVICE_LINE               
,PBS_LINE                      
,Q2O_LINE_ID                   
,QUANTITY                      
,QUOTE_TYPE                    
,SERVICE_LEVEL                 
,SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,SMS_LINE                      
,TRANSACTION_SOURCE            
,QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,UNIT_NET_PRICE                
,ORDER_ORIGIN                   
,PID_MATCHING_VALUE            
,ORDER_BOOK_DATE               
,RECORD_OFFSET                 
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,PARTITION_NUMBER              
,TOPIC_NAME   
,COALESCE(OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID, -9999) AS OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID          
,OA_LINKED_ATTRIB_ID           
,OA_ATTRIBUTED_ITEM            
,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          
,OA_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION        
,OA_PID_MATCHING_VALUE         
,OA_SALES_MOTION       
,ATTIBUTION_CD
,TRX_ID AS DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
,TRX_VERSION AS DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID
,ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,COALESCE(RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE
,'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM 
(
SELECT ST_SI.* 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING ST_SI
WHERE ST_SI.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate'  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  -  INTERVAL '1' MINUTE
AND  COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN )
 QUALIFY RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY TRX_ID ORDER BY TRX_VERSION DESC)=1
) ST2
